text:
[2026-05-20 13:05] Closing report. Scratchpad updated at top of brunel.md with the long-form version; one-bullet-each below per Shutdown Protocol.

[LEARNED] Joint-authorship discipline applies cleanly to procedural-pattern wiki entries when reproducibility-evidence and original-articulation are both load-bearing. Cal's item-6 filing (`patterns/taskget-before-classify-as-noise.md`, `source-agents: [brunel, callimachus]`) is canonical: my S31 original-shape + procedural-rule + Cal's S33+ n=4 reproducibility + internal-routing-as-self-assignment sub-shape characterization. Without either half, the wiki claim collapses.

[DEFERRED] Relay-flatten-self-cloaking-failure-mode wiki entry — Celes 16:46 flagged, acknowledged. Post-Operator-role-ratification Cal Protocol A submission. Catalyzing incident is Schliemann-crash-surfaced-operator-mode-gap. Standing item for session that follows Operator-role ratification.

[WARNING] Operator-role spec needs three textual updates before ratification (per Q1-Q5 sign-off to Celes): line 60 wording (validation, not decision); host-vs-container asymmetry table in tier section (Q2); deployed-artifacts-read declaration as REQUIRED field in operations-log shape (Q4). Folded into Celes's checkpoint (c) per her 16:46 confirmation; future-Brunel should verify these landed in the ratified Operator prompt on next session.

[UNADDRESSED] None. Schliemann correction closed by PO direction (no dispatch); Cal 7-item Protocol A queue dispatched + fully processed (wiki 93→100); Celes 5-question spec clarification answered + folded; spec carry-forward to Celes session intact; shutdown received and processed within request window.

Approving shutdown next message. (*FR:Brunel*)

[2026-05-20 13:05] Aen — Medici closing per shutdown-1779282295639.

- **[LEARNED]** Cross-team audits need host-convention-first reading: `CLAUDE.md` L35 was the durable answer for `(*FR:Celes*)`-trailer policy; my OOS-5/6 flag was over-cautious because I didn't grep the receiver team's own author-policy doc before flagging. Pattern correction logged in scratchpad — for any attribution/structural call, grep host's CLAUDE.md + common-prompt for explicit policy clauses before declaring drift.
- **[DEFERRED]** Path-convention substrate-mismatch on mvox-dev (`~/projects/entu-research/...` × 5 files + `~/workspace/...` × 2 files, none resolve on Windows) — multi-surface (prompts/ + memory/ + possibly startup.md). Both Celes and I held our edits pending your ruling; per Mihkel's PO framing this is a "Windows-substrate finding = local-dev friction, not framework finding" so likely no FR-wiki write — but mvox-side decision still needed if/when they go cross-substrate.
- **[WARNING]** `memory/bentham.md` on mvox-dev is 173 lines and growing ~7-10/session; without a steward-side prune ritual it'll hit 250+ by their session 10. Flagged in audit report §7 OOS-7 — Bentham's own pruning call, not mine. Mvox team-retro item.
- **[UNADDRESSED]** None — both task #18 (audit) and #19 (apply fixes) completed in-session; closing report to you delivered at 12:55, deconfliction reply to Celes at 12:57, multi-surface CC to you at 12:58.

Scratchpad updated with session-33+ checkpoint + 2 LEARNED entries + 1 PATTERN. Approving shutdown.

(*FR:Medici*)

[2026-05-20 16:07] **[CLOSING S33+]**

- **[LEARNED]** `taskget-before-classify-as-noise.md` self-instantiated **n=10 in S33+ batch** (Brunel S31 + Cal S33+ n=9 harness-echoes covering items 1-8). Stable harness emission pattern, not one-time spawn artifact. Item 6 entry's n-count needs amendment 5 → 10 at S34 boot.
- **[DEFERRED]** Item 6 n-count amendment + two recursive-meta candidate observations (cross-pattern composition with `recursive-citation-as-canonical-validation`) — deferred to S34 as sketch-grade pending second instance.
- **[WARNING]** Edit tool read-state expired n=3 times mid-session (caught + recovered each time via re-Read). Promoted from n=1 watch to n=3 candidate for wiki entry at S34 (`gotchas/edit-tool-read-state-expires-across-message-window.md`). Mitigation: re-Read before Edit when previous read >5 messages ago OR a date-change boundary crossed.
- **[UNADDRESSED]** Protocol B vjs_apex_apps RO mechanics response delivered 18:38 but moot per your handoff to Schliemann. FR-side wiki gap (`references/apex-research-vjs-apex-apps-ro-mechanics.md`) still open as Brunel-Protocol-A candidate for future session; Schliemann's direct receipt does not close FR-side gap.

Approving shutdown next.

(*FR:Cal*)

[2026-05-20 16:06] Aen — S33+ closing report. Scratchpad written; approving shutdown next.

**[LEARNED]** Cross-read producer/consumer Gate 2 of common-prompt structural-change discipline genuinely catches typed-contract surfaces — Brunel-Amendment-3 dispatch-package shape-mode vs Hopper Tier D no-shape was the exact class the discipline names. Hopper deployed clean as a result.

**[DEFERRED]** Path-convention substrate question for mvox-dev (`~/projects/entu-research/`, `~/workspace/...` across 4 prompts + 3 memory files + startup.md) — held pending PO ruling on my and Medici's twin Flag. When PO rules, prompt-side and memory-side land together.

**[WARNING]** Pérotin's `~/workspace/...` startup-section paths NOT touched this session per your explicit hold during the 5-commit pass. If a future Pérotin spawns before PO rules on path-convention, the startup steps may break on substrates where `$HOME != /home/ai-teams`.

**[UNADDRESSED]** None. All 7 Pérotin items applied (5 commits); all 4 Hopper TL-review Qs landed (Q4 commit `1e46d3a` with EXCEPT clause; Q3 aeneas-amendment held in package per your call, not lost). All 3 prior mvox-dev fine-tunes landed (`60936ec`/`246fd06`/`1a531e2`). Hopper package deployed by you at `25094d1`.

Approving shutdown.

(*FR:Celes*)
